functions.name: SUM
functions.description: Returns the sum of a series of numbers.

functions.name: AVERAGE
functions.description: Returns the arithmetic mean of a set of values.

functions.name: MIN
functions.description: Returns the smallest value in a list.

functions.name: MAX
functions.description: Returns the largest value in a list.

functions.name: COUNT
functions.description: Counts numeric values in a list.

functions.name: COUNTA
functions.description: Counts non-empty values in a list.

functions.name: PRODUCT
functions.description: Multiplies numbers together.

functions.name: SUMPRODUCT
functions.description: Sum of products of corresponding array values.

functions.name: SUMX2MY2
functions.description: Sum of differences of squares of corresponding values.

functions.name: SUMX2PY2
functions.description: Sum of sums of squares of corresponding values.

functions.name: SUMXMY2
functions.description: Sum of squares of differences of corresponding values.

functions.name: IF
functions.description: Returns one value if condition is true, another if false.

functions.name: AND
functions.description: Returns TRUE if all arguments are TRUE.

functions.name: OR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if any argument is TRUE.

functions.name: NOT
functions.description: Returns the opposite of a logical value.

functions.name: IFERROR
functions.description: Returns value if no error, otherwise fallback.

functions.name: TRUE
functions.description: Returns the logical value TRUE.

functions.name: FALSE
functions.description: Returns the logical value FALSE.

functions.name: ABS
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: ROUND
functions.description: Rounds a number to specified digits.

functions.name: ROUNDUP
functions.description: Rounds a number up, away from zero.

functions.name: ROUNDDOWN
functions.description: Rounds a number down, toward zero.

functions.name: INT
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

functions.name: MOD
functions.description: Returns the remainder after division.

functions.name: POWER
functions.description: Raises a number to a power.

functions.name: SQRT
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: SIGN
functions.description: Returns the sign of a number.

functions.name: CEILING
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest multiple.

functions.name: FLOOR
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple.

functions.name: CONCAT
functions.description: Joins text values together.

functions.name: CONCATENATE
functions.description: Joins text values together.

functions.name: LEFT
functions.description: Returns the leftmost characters from a string.

functions.name: RIGHT
functions.description: Returns the rightmost characters from a string.

functions.name: MID
functions.description: Returns a segment of a string.

functions.name: LEN
functions.description: Returns the length of a string.

functions.name: TRIM
functions.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace.

functions.name: SUBSTITUTE
functions.description: Replaces occurrences of text within a string.

functions.name: TEXT
functions.description: Formats a value as text.

functions.name: UPPER
functions.description: Converts text to uppercase.

functions.name: LOWER
functions.description: Converts text to lowercase.

functions.name: REPT
functions.description: Repeats text a specified number of times.

functions.name: TEXTJOIN
functions.description: Joins text with a delimiter, optionally ignoring empty cells.

functions.name: JOIN
functions.description: Joins text with a delimiter.

functions.name: VALUE
functions.description: Converts a text value to a number.

functions.name: DATE
functions.description: Creates a date from year, month, day.

functions.name: TODAY
functions.description: Returns the current date.

functions.name: NOW
functions.description: Returns the current date and time.

functions.name: YEAR
functions.description: Returns the year from a date.

functions.name: MONTH
functions.description: Returns the month from a date.

functions.name: DAY
functions.description: Returns the day of the month from a date.

functions.name: HOUR
functions.description: Returns the hour from a time.

functions.name: MINUTE
functions.description: Returns the minute from a time.

functions.name: SECOND
functions.description: Returns the second from a time.

functions.name: COUNTIF
functions.description: Counts values matching a criterion.

functions.name: SUMIF
functions.description: Sums values matching a criterion.

functions.name: AVERAGEIF
functions.description: Returns the average of values matching a criterion.

functions.name: COUNTIFS
functions.description: Counts values matching multiple criteria.

functions.name: SUMIFS
functions.description: Sums values matching multiple criteria.

functions.name: AVERAGEIFS
functions.description: Returns the average of values matching multiple criteria.

functions.name: MAXIFS
functions.description: Returns the maximum value matching multiple criteria.

functions.name: MINIFS
functions.description: Returns the minimum value matching multiple criteria.

functions.name: COUNTBLANK
functions.description: Counts empty cells in a range.

functions.name: AVERAGEA
functions.description: Average including text and logical values.

functions.name: MAXA
functions.description: Maximum including text and logical values.

functions.name: MINA
functions.description: Minimum including text and logical values.

functions.name: PI
functions.description: Returns the value of Pi.

functions.name: RAND
functions.description: Returns a random number between 0 and 1.

functions.name: RANDBETWEEN
functions.description: Returns a random integer between two values.

functions.name: LOG
functions.description: Returns the logarithm with specified base.

functions.name: LOG10
functions.description: Returns the base-10 logarithm.

functions.name: LN
functions.description: Returns the natural logarithm.

functions.name: EXP
functions.description: Returns e raised to the power of a number.

functions.name: SIN
functions.description: Returns the sine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: COS
functions.description: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: TAN
functions.description: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.

functions.name: RADIANS
functions.description: Converts degrees to radians.

functions.name: DEGREES
functions.description: Converts radians to degrees.

functions.name: EXACT
functions.description: Checks whether two strings are identical.

functions.name: FIND
functions.description: Finds a substring position (case-sensitive).

functions.name: SEARCH
functions.description: Finds a substring position (case-insensitive).

functions.name: ISBLANK
functions.description: Checks whether a value is blank.

functions.name: ISNUMBER
functions.description: Checks whether a value is a number.

functions.name: ISTEXT
functions.description: Checks whether a value is text.

functions.name: ISERROR
functions.description: Checks whether a value is an error.

functions.name: DATEVALUE
functions.description: Converts a date string into a date value.

functions.name: TIME
functions.description: Creates a time from hour, minute, second.

functions.name: DAYS
functions.description: Returns the number of days between two dates.

functions.name: EDATE
functions.description: Returns a date offset by a number of months.

functions.name: EOMONTH
functions.description: Returns the last day of the month offset by months.

functions.name: WEEKDAY
functions.description: Returns the day of the week for a date.

functions.name: WEEKNUM
functions.description: Returns the week number of the year.

functions.name: TRUNC
functions.description: Truncates a number to a specified number of digits.

functions.name: SUMSQ
functions.description: Returns the sum of the squares of numbers.

functions.name: QUOTIENT
functions.description: Returns the integer portion of a division.

functions.name: MROUND
functions.description: Rounds a number to the nearest multiple.

functions.name: EVEN
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest even integer.

functions.name: ODD
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest odd integer.

functions.name: ISEVEN
functions.description: Checks whether a number is even.

functions.name: ISODD
functions.description: Checks whether a number is odd.

functions.name: ISLOGICAL
functions.description: Checks whether a value is logical (TRUE/FALSE).

functions.name: NA
functions.description: Returns the #N/A error value.

functions.name: ISNA
functions.description: Checks whether a value is #N/A.

functions.name: TYPE
functions.description: Returns a number identifying the type of a value.

functions.name: IFNA
functions.description: Returns fallback if value is #N/A.

functions.name: IFS
functions.description: Evaluates multiple conditions in order.

functions.name: XOR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if an odd number of arguments are TRUE.

functions.name: SWITCH
functions.description: Matches an expression against cases.

functions.name: LAMBDA
functions.description: Creates a reusable lambda function.

functions.name: LET
functions.description: Assigns names to values and returns the final expression.

functions.name: ARRAYFORMULA
functions.description: Enables array outputs from a formula expression.

functions.name: ARRAY_CONSTRAIN
functions.description: Constrains an array to a specified size.

functions.name: CHOOSECOLS
functions.description: Selects specific columns from an array.

functions.name: CHOOSEROWS
functions.description: Selects specific rows from an array.

functions.name: WRAPROWS
functions.description: Wraps values into rows.

functions.name: WRAPCOLS
functions.description: Wraps values into columns.

functions.name: FILTER
functions.description: Filters a range based on conditions.

functions.name: SORT
functions.description: Sorts rows in a range by one or more columns.

functions.name: SORTN
functions.description: Returns the first n rows after sorting.

functions.name: UNIQUE
functions.description: Returns unique rows or columns from a range.

functions.name: MAP
functions.description: Maps a lambda across arrays.

functions.name: BYROW
functions.description: Applies a lambda to each row.

functions.name: BYCOL
functions.description: Applies a lambda to each column.

functions.name: REDUCE
functions.description: Reduces an array into a single value.

functions.name: SCAN
functions.description: Returns intermediate results while reducing an array.

functions.name: MAKEARRAY
functions.description: Creates an array by applying a lambda to coordinates.

functions.name: SEQUENCE
functions.description: Generates a sequence of numbers.

functions.name: TRANSPOSE
functions.description: Transposes rows and columns of an array.

functions.name: FLATTEN
functions.description: Flattens ranges into a single column.

functions.name: TOCOL
functions.description: Transforms a range into a single column.

functions.name: TOROW
functions.description: Transforms a range into a single row.

functions.name: HSTACK
functions.description: Stacks arrays horizontally.

functions.name: VSTACK
functions.description: Stacks arrays vertically.

functions.name: FREQUENCY
functions.description: Calculates a frequency distribution for values.

functions.name: MMULT
functions.description: Calculates matrix multiplication.

functions.name: MDETERM
functions.description: Returns the determinant of a matrix.

functions.name: MINVERSE
functions.description: Returns the inverse of a matrix.

functions.name: LINEST
functions.description: Returns linear regression coefficients.

functions.name: LOGEST
functions.description: Returns exponential regression coefficients.

functions.name: TREND
functions.description: Returns values along a linear trend.

functions.name: GROWTH
functions.description: Returns values along an exponential trend.

functions.name: DAVERAGE
functions.description: Returns the average of matching values in a table.

functions.name: DCOUNT
functions.description: Counts numeric values in a table matching criteria.

functions.name: DCOUNTA
functions.description: Counts non-empty values in a table matching criteria.

functions.name: DGET
functions.description: Returns a single matching value from a table.

functions.name: DMAX
functions.description: Returns the maximum numeric value from a table.

functions.name: DMIN
functions.description: Returns the minimum numeric value from a table.

functions.name: DPRODUCT
functions.description: Returns the product of matching numeric values.

functions.name: DSTDEV
functions.description: Returns the sample standard deviation of matching values.

functions.name: DSTDEVP
functions.description: Returns the population standard deviation of matching values.

functions.name: DSUM
functions.description: Returns the sum of matching numeric values.

functions.name: DVAR
functions.description: Returns the sample variance of matching values.

functions.name: DVARP
functions.description: Returns the population variance of matching values.
